---
title: "Frances Nightingale"
---

## Frances Nightingale

**Dates:** (1789-1880)

**Maiden name:** (Smith)

### Description

mother of Florence Nightingale

### Biography

She sent a better picture for <i>A Book of Golden Deeds</i>, 1865

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 31st 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
